documentation.description:
RFC 4253 Section 6.4 / Section 7.1:
After algorithm negotiation, each negotiated algorithm name must be
resolved to the corresponding cryptographic operation bundle.
Crypto_Provider bundles the algorithm list and resolver functions
so that Client_Sessions.Perform_KEX can automatically set the
correct crypto ops after negotiation.

record_types.name: Crypto_Provider

access_types.name: Cipher_Resolver
access_types.code:
type Cipher_Resolver is
  access function (Name : String) return SSH_Protocol.Transport.Cipher_Ops;

access_types.name: Host_Key_Resolver
access_types.code:
type Host_Key_Resolver is
  access function (Name : String) return SSH_Protocol.Kex_Crypto.Host_Key_Ops;

access_types.name: KEX_Resolver
access_types.code:
type KEX_Resolver is
  access function (Name : String) return SSH_Protocol.Kex_Crypto.KEX_Crypto_Ops;

access_types.name: MAC_Resolver
access_types.code:
type MAC_Resolver is
  access function (Name : String) return SSH_Protocol.Transport.MAC_Compute;
